text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, August 31. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
